# DataLatte — Digital Marketing Agency

> DataLatte (datalatte.pro) is a data-driven digital marketing agency founded by Nataliia Makota — a senior marketing consultant with experience at OMD, Dentsu, BBDO, and GroupM. We help local businesses, mid-market companies, and enterprise brands grow with performance marketing across all major ad platforms.

## About

- Founder: Nataliia Makota — 10+ years in digital marketing, worked on Fortune 500 and FTSE 100 campaigns across Europe and the US
- Location: Bałtyk Business Square, Poznań, Poland
- Serving: US, UK, Australia, Canada, and international markets
- Contact: hi@datalatte.pro | +48 503 589 781
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/datalattepro/

## Services

- Google Ads (Search, Shopping, Display, Performance Max, YouTube)
- Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram)
- TikTok Advertising
- Programmatic Advertising (DV360, The Trade Desk, Amazon DSP)
- CTV & OTT Advertising
- LinkedIn Ads
- Google Business Profile Optimization
- Local SEO
- Marketing Analytics & Reporting
- Email & SMS Marketing
- Social Media Marketing
- AI Marketing Automation
- Website & Landing Page Design
